mapper.sql: select item_id, groupid, type_id, item_code, item_name, status, created_time from fin_auxiliary_items
mapper.insert:
insert into fin_auxiliary_items
groupid, type_id, item_code, item_name, status, created_time,
#{groupid}, #{typeId}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{status}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from fin_auxiliary_items where item_id in
#{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO fin_auxiliary_items (groupid, type_id, item_code, item_name, status, created_time) SELECT #{groupid}, #{typeId}, c.number, c.name, 1, NOW() FROM db_erp.t_erp_customer c WHERE c.shopid = #{shopid} AND c.number IS NOT NULL AND c.number != ''

INSERT IGNORE INTO fin_auxiliary_items (groupid, type_id, item_code, item_name, status, created_time) SELECT #{groupid}, #{typeId}, t.account, i.name, 1, NOW() FROM db_admin.t_user t LEFT JOIN db_admin.t_userinfo i ON i.id = t.id WHERE t.leader_id = #{shopid} AND t.account IS NOT NULL AND t.account != ''

INSERT IGNORE INTO fin_auxiliary_items (groupid, type_id, item_code, item_name, status, created_time) SELECT #{groupid}, #{typeId}, d.code, d.name, 1, NOW() FROM db_admin.t_sys_dept d WHERE d.id IS NOT NULL AND d.name IS NOT NULL AND d.name != ''
